title: Riskfolio-Lib
summary:
Portfolio Optimization and Quantitative Strategic Asset Allocation in Python 
 Quantitative Strategic Asset Allocation, Easy for Everyone. Riskfolio-Lib is a library for making quantitative strategic asset allocation or portfolio optimization in Python made in Peru x1F1F5x1F1EA. Its objective is to help students, academics and practitioners to build investment portfolios based on mathematically complex models with low effort. It is built on top of
